rag_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to ports
Use `assign` in implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Use `eq` for equations and `const` for constants in type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without exposure
